learnings.text: The VibeTeacher integration was already complete. The requested code block was present at exactly the right location (step 3.5) between harvest learnings and save results. Testing with 'python3 Skills/pulse/scripts/pulse.py finalize pulse-v2' confirmed the integration works correctly, producing teaching moments and including them in SMS summaries.

The VibeTeacher integration was already completed by a previous Drop or development work. The implementation in lines 1256-1281 of finalize_build() matches the requirements exactly: fetches teaching data, formats term names (first 3), adds count suffix for additional terms, includes CTA, handles errors gracefully, and appends to both success/failure SMS paths.

Pulse deposit learnings can have multiple formats - list of objects with 'text' field, list of strings, or single strings. The harvest function needed to handle all three formats and skip malformed JSON files gracefully.

The VibeTeacher integration was already complete. The requested code block was present at exactly the right location (step 3.5) between harvest learnings and save results. Testing with 'python3 Skills/pulse/scripts/pulse.py finalize pulse-v2' confirmed the integration works correctly, producing teaching moments and including them in SMS summaries.

The VibeTeacher integration was already completed by a previous Drop or development work. The implementation in lines 1256-1281 of finalize_build() matches the requirements exactly: fetches teaching data, formats term names (first 3), adds count suffix for additional terms, includes CTA, handles errors gracefully, and appends to both success/failure SMS paths.

Fixed two issues: (1) Enhanced extract_learnings_from_deposit() to handle both list-of-objects and list-of-strings formats for learnings in deposits, (2) Fixed invalid JSON syntax in D3.1-plan-generator.json where string values were missing quotes. The harvest command now correctly extracts text from structured learning objects with 'text' and 'tags' fields.

All VibeTeacher integrations are functioning correctly. The finalize process properly activates teaching, captures teaching moments, and includes teaching summaries in SMS notifications. No regressions detected in existing finalize flow.
